author: Omits
text:
Extract shared command/plugin-layer plumbing helpers

The redundancy audit found copy-pasted CLI glue in the command and plugin layers. Consolidate it into a new commands::plumbing module with three helpers, plus one policy method, with no behaviour change.

SyncOverride::from_flags decodes the --sync/--no-sync pair, replacing the verbatim match in claim and lifecycle. sync_inputs() loads the shared sync-policy front half (CLI override, repo Config, LocalConfig); resolve_claim_policy folds into cmd_claim. finish_state_event() owns the state_head/finish/Rollback::State dance for create/review/close/update, taking the event commit as a closure so the rollback snapshot stays pre-event. dispatch_sync_each() owns the plugin sync fan-out and its two shared literals across bl sync and bl sync --review.

event_subcommand_arg now derives the wire name from Event's serde rename_all instead of a hand-written match, so the CLI flag and JSON encoding share one source of truth; its pinning test is dropped.
